caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt, a green baseball cap, and black over-ear headphones speaks into a professional microphone in a room filled with framed photographs and clothing racks. His shirt features the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" in white letters. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white t-shirt, and various racks of apparel are visible. Small logos appear in the bottom corners of the scene, including one that reads "PROPERLY" in red. The man remains in a consistent position throughout the sequence, slightly nodding and speaking as he looks downward. The background remains static, with the gallery wall of photographs providing a consistent backdrop. The only movement is the subtle motion of the man's head and facial expressions as he talks into the microphone.
